reviewTexts: Really nice spot to get some work done. Don't expect it to be quiet, since there will be ambient noise from people chatting. But a pair of headphones and you're golden. A lot of first dates here, a fun ambience, and an extensive menu of teas.

One of the widest tea selections I have ever seen, nice ambience with lots of different types of sitting options. Its a quaint kind of a place, you ring a bell thats one on table to call for servers to put your order. Generally a quiet place but certainly conducive to fun and conversations. Do try their snack platters, I love the sesame cookie.
Love coming here it’s a go to when I’m in Pittsburgh and love they have more gluten free labeling! Their chai and boba tea is the best!!

One of my favorite places on Earth. A wonderfully large selection of teas from around the world, served in an intimate and quiet setting. A great place to hang out with friends or enjoy a quiet booth or table. This location offers a wonderful selection  of food as well. If I could live there, I would! Staff wonderful too. Plenty of parking in area.

such a wonderful tea shop and wonderful experience! very casual, relaxing environment. Staff is extremely friendly and knowledgeable about tea. Large array of unique teas. Food is very good as well! a wonderful pseudo- "third space"  where you can sip tea, relax, play a board game, study, and talk to other patrons.
The ambient is so whimsy. Vanilla tea is one of my favorites. It's hard to get a seat sometimes because it's crowded. It's a place for study, craft, read and chat with friends.
I live really close to here and make this my meeting point with all my friends who never tried it before. It is always a wonderful experience with nice employees, delicious food and smooth drinks!

I really love this place. The staff is kind & knowledgeable, the tea is delicious, the atmosphere is welcoming to spend some time chatting or enjoying a book. I havent tried the food here. I typically get their tulsi chai which I LOVE.

Updating to add: i have been back and tried some food. The babaganoush is delicious!
Fantastic atmosphere, excellent tea, and great food. I spent hours here hanging out with my friends and I will be back soon.

keywordPhrases.exampleQuote: such a wonderful tea shop and wonderful experience!

unfair_advantage.label: community affection
unfair_advantage.evidence: 1,107 Google reviews with a review in the last 5 days, the highest community-spark reading in this issue's set.
